Statement: Three-phase power service (DEL-015-01) must be energized before receptacle circuits can be commissioned. Main distribution panelboard(s) must be installed and branch circuit capacity available.

Notes: FACT. Stated as prerequisite P-01 in Procedure; reinforced in Datasheet Conditions (Upstream Dependency) and Guidance Principle 3 and Specification REQ-015-03-05.

Statement: IFC Receptacle Layout Plans (DEL-004-05) must be issued for construction before rough-in can begin. These are the binding authority for receptacle locations quantities and circuit assignments.
EvidenceQuote: DEL-004-05 Receptacle Layout Plans (IFC): signed/stamped drawings issued for construction
Notes: FACT. Stated as prerequisite P-02 in Procedure; reinforced in Specification REQ-015-03-03 and Guidance Principle 4. Final receptacle layout authority.

Statement: IFC Panel Schedules (DEL-004-06) must be issued for construction before breaker installation and circuit identification. Required for circuit assignments for all receptacle circuits.
EvidenceQuote: DEL-004-06 Panel Schedules (IFC): circuit assignments confirmed for all receptacle circuits
Notes: FACT. Stated as prerequisite P-03 in Procedure; reinforced in Specification REQ-015-03-03 and Datasheet Construction section.

Statement: IFC Electrical Specification (DEL-004-09) must be available before device procurement and installation. Required to confirm device grade NEMA configurations GFCI/AFCI requirements installation methods and code edition.

Notes: FACT. Stated as prerequisite P-04 in Procedure; reinforced across Specification REQs (REQ-015-03-01 -02 -04 -07 -09 -10) and Datasheet Construction and Guidance Principle 4.

Statement: DEL-015-03 requires building structure (wall framing and rough-in) to be complete before receptacle device installation can proceed. Rough framing and concrete pours must be complete for areas receiving receptacles.

Notes: FACT. Stated as prerequisite P-05 in Procedure; reinforced in Datasheet Conditions (Building Structure Dependency). Target is external to PKG-015 (general contractor scope).

Statement: DEL-015-02 (Lighting) and DEL-015-03 (Receptacles) share panel infrastructure. Circuit assignments must be coordinated to avoid overloading panel circuits. Hold point: do not finalize breaker installation until panel capacity coordination with DEL-015-02 is confirmed.
